description_long: This shotgun features a robust, metallic body with a dark matte finish, accented by reddish-brown wooden or polymer components on the grip, fore-end, and stock. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a prominent muzzle brake, suggesting a tactical or urban combat design. The magazine is curved and detachable, indicating a repeating action mechanism, and the receiver is detailed with visible screws and mechanical elements. The stock is a skeletonized, open-frame design, likely for weight reduction and improved maneuverability, with a textured grip area. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Overall, the shotgun combines utilitarian metalwork with ergonomic, textured grips for effective handling in urban environments.
description: A tactical shotgun with a dark metal body, reddish-brown textured grips, a skeletonized stock, and a short barrel with a muzzle brake. It features a curved detachable magazine and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, muzzle brake, and the alignment of the barrel with the fore-end grip and stock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the skeletonized stock, curved magazine, and detailed receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the open-frame stock, grip, and the alignment of the barrel and magazine from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with additional detail on the ejection port and receiver components.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, vented muzzle brake
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
